findings.evidence: `rg -n "coeff_ofFinsuppMultiplicity|/--" code/TauCeti/AlgebraicGeometry/WeilDivisor/FiniteSum.lean` shows `lemma coeff_ofFinsuppMultiplicity` at line 78 immediately after `@[simp]`, with no preceding `/-- ... -/` docstring.
findings.fix: Add a docstring describing that coefficients of `ofFinsuppMultiplicity m` are the multiplicities `m x`.
findings.issue: The public coefficient theorem `coeff_ofFinsuppMultiplicity` has no docstring, unlike the corresponding coefficient APIs for the finite-set constructors.

findings.evidence: Lines 327 and 332 define public lemmas `ofFinsetWithMultiplicity_empty` and `ofFinsetWithMultiplicity_insert`; the preceding lines contain only `@[simp]`, not docstrings.
findings.fix: Add short docstrings for `ofFinsetWithMultiplicity_empty` and `ofFinsetWithMultiplicity_insert` explaining the empty-set value and insert decomposition.
findings.issue: The public empty/insert constructor lemmas for `ofFinsetWithMultiplicity` are undocumented despite being part of the exported finite-sum API.

findings.evidence: Lines 532 and 536 define public lemmas `ofFinset_empty` and `ofFinset_insert`; the preceding lines contain only `@[simp]`, not docstrings.
findings.fix: Add short docstrings for `ofFinset_empty` and `ofFinset_insert` explaining the empty-set value and insert decomposition.
findings.issue: The public empty/insert constructor lemmas for `ofFinset` are undocumented despite being part of the exported named finite-set divisor API.

summary: The new module has a useful module docstring and most public API documentation is accurate, but several public constructor lemmas are undocumented.
